content: هُوَّ مِتجَوِّز ثَلاَثَة سِتَّات وَ بِيِدَوَّر عَلى اَلرَّابِعَة

transcriptions.arabizi: huwwa mitgawwiz thalaetha sittaet wa biyidawwar Aala ilraabiAa

relationships: eng:he has three wives and is looking for the fourth
